title: Father's Day Gift Idea
excerpt: We're not much for exchanging gifts on the actual day of occasions. If I see something I think someone will like, I usually get it and just give it to them whenever (unless I can hold out for an actual…
body:
We're not much for exchanging gifts on the actual day of occasions. If I see something I think someone will like, I usually get it and just give it to them whenever (unless I can hold out for an actual occasion). Last Friday night, we attended a wine benefit for City Year at Mr.C's in Beverly Hills. There was both a silent and live auction. I bid on several items, including this Dollar Shave Club membership and won.

Their packaging is clever and their website is awesome. Since we attended the event together, JC was able to start using and enjoying the goods, and the guy in your life might too!
